DESCRIPTION:

! lore might be inaccurate i sorta had to plagiarize her extras info section !
" "
"White Rabbit", also known as "Vanny", went from a regular fan of the Fazbear brand and soon later became obsessed with it. She was always into horror movies and local legend stories as a child, but it was all up until her visit to Fazbear's Fright where her hyperfixation with Springtrap sparked. She can be summed up to that of a fangirl, THAT obsessed. <_<
Because of this gal's "hyperfixation", Vanny now purely focuses on keeping the Fazbear legacy alive by any means necessary - especially the worst parts of it. for springtrap! <3
Apart from Vanny's.. cartoonishly evil motives, her quirky girl personality never wavered growing up. She's still quite the charming and quirky character. and who knows, maybe if you're just as much of a fan of the Fazbear brand like her, you two could get along quite nicely... :eyes: :eyes: :eyes:
" "
